log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 11 falling damage. HP: 167/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Dragonborn — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 51/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Dragonborn — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 34/67
→ Dragonborn — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 9 vs DC 10]
Young Red Dragon attacks Dragonborn — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 14/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Dragonborn — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Dragonborn — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
→ Dragonborn — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 6 vs DC 10]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
